name: io.github.zyntarasystems/human-dispatch-mcp
description: Universal dispatch layer that routes AI-agent tasks to human service providers via webhooks

environmentVariables.name: MANUAL_WEBHOOK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Webhook URL for the manual fallback backend to send task notifications

environmentVariables.name: PROVIDERS_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: JSON array of webhook provider objects to pre-seed on startup
